name: documentation-plugin
description: Documentation and Office document generation plugin for architecture docs, charts, DOCX, PPTX, and XLSX workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Generate and maintain technical docs and office files.
interface.longDescription: Provides Codex skills for updating docs, generating diagrams and charts, and producing DOCX, PPTX, and XLSX deliverables.
defaultPrompt: Update the README to match the current codebase behavior.
Create a Mermaid diagram for this architecture.
Generate a slide deck outline from these product notes.
